title: New York DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — Title & Salary Listing + PS&T schedule)
description: Narrative research notes for New York DDS pay: administering agency (NY OTDA Division of Disability Determinations), the verified Disability Analyst examiner series (Disability Analyst 2 = SG 20, 3 = SG 23, 4 = SG 25, all PEF/PS&T) and the supervisory Disability Analyst 5 (SG 62, Management/Confidential), with SG assignments from the official NY Title and Salary Listing and Hiring/Job-rate figures from the OER PS&T salary schedule eff 2025-03-27. PEF Bargaining Unit 5 (PS&T) CBA Apr-2023 → Apr-2026. Corrects the prior 'Trainee/Analyst 1' guess (no such current titles). Companion to NY/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: NY Office of Employee Relations (OER) / NY Dept of Civil Service / PEF; NY Office of Temporary and Disability Assistance (OTDA) Division of Disability Determinations
source.title: NY DDS salary research notes (Title and Salary Listing t3vp-5tka + OER PS&T salary schedule, retrieved 2026-06-02)

notes: Authoritative for the examiner classes: Disability Analyst 2/3/4 SG assignments (SG 20/23/25, PEF) verified from the NY Title and Salary Listing (Open Data NY t3vp-5tka) and Hiring/Job-rate figures from the OER PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27. Supervisory Disability Analyst 5 is SG 62 (M/C) — M-1 band candidate figures recorded with the SG-62-to-M-1 schedule-row crosswalk flagged unverified. Corrects prior notes: the current NY plan has no Disability Analyst Trainee or Analyst 1.
